title: Now hiring: Junior Media Strategist
author: Ibukun Adebolu, PhD
summary: We are seeking a Junior Media Strategist to support our digital growth initiatives. This role combines social media strategy, paid advertising, SEO optimization, and basic project management to ensure timely delivery and measurable results. It’s ideal for someone passionate about digital marketing and eager to gain hands-on experience in a dynamic, impact-driven environment.

title: Call for Interns: Industrial Attachment (SIWES)
author: Ibukun Adebolu, PhD
summary: Nexus Space Ltd is seeking interns for remote sensing, programming, Earth observation dashboards, AI-driven geospatial analytics, and cross-domain collaboration. Applicants must be enrolled in a higher institution, currently observing SIWES, and available for a hybrid, supervised 6-month attachment (extendable to 1 year). No financial remuneration.
